summary: The diff demonstrates partial implementation of the collective offerings feature. Frontend components and UI were created, but backend implementation is completely absent. The core automatic budget synchronization (REQ-4) and backend storage (REQ-3) requirements are not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store collective offerings in the backend with locality ID, amount, date, description, and timestamps
missing_requirements.reason: No backend file modifications show the CollectiveOffering type definition or any backend methods (createCollectiveOffering, updateCollectiveOffering, deleteCollectiveOffering, getCollectiveOfferingsByLocality). The frontend hooks reference these methods in useQueries.ts, but the backend implementation is missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Automatically create a budget transaction entry when a collective offering is added or edited in Miejscowości
missing_requirements.reason: No backend logic shows automatic budget transaction creation when collective offerings are created/updated/deleted. The frontend calls addOffering/updateOffering/deleteOffering mutations, but there is no backend code implementing the automatic synchronization logic described in the acceptance criteria.
